race.comment: DEEPFLOAT DIVA (6) looks a big improver here. Resumed after a long break over the border and wasn't disgraced. Will strip much fitter and has a strong record this course and distance. Expected to go close. SUPER ALANA (5) was a winner two back then led and faded in open class before another break. Trialling well and loves the course and distance. Will give a sight fresh. SIR NOW (1) is the class sprinter of the race and will be tested by the big weight and wide gate. Has won fresh though and top record course and distance with four wins and two minors from six tries. Resuming in easier grade and will be winding up late. ENUFF SEDUCTION (3) tackled the Group 3 Hawkes Stakes last time and was beaten just over a length. This is easier and have to include with a repeat of that figure. OUT OF SQUARE (8) is a recent trial winner and has a strong record fresh. Don't underestimate.
